name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. To prepare dough, combine margarine, egg white, 1 tablespoon milk, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
4. Divide dough into two halves. Cover and chill.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll each half of dough to 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Using 2-1/2-inch cutters, cut dough into desired shapes. Place cookies about 1 inch apart onto unprepared baking sheets.
7. Bake for 7 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Meanwhile, to prepare icing, combine powdered sugar, remaining vanilla, and milk in a small mixing bowl. If desired, color with food coloring.
9. When cookies have cooled, spread icing over them.
